title: Lifting the Fog: India liberalizes FDI framework for Land Border Countries
description: The Union Cabinet recently approved significant amendments to the guidelines governing foreign direct investment from countries sharing a land border with India. Announced via the Press Information Bureau on 10 March 2026, these changes mark a welcome recalibration of the restrictions originally introduced through Press Note 3 of 2020 (PN3), addressing longstanding ambiguities that had created uncertainty for the global investor community. Coming in the broader context of easing border tensions
